TestCase.name: testInsertOnlySource
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(op=[$0], id=[$1], name=[$2]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) op, INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, insert_only_source]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[null], select=[op,id,name], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) op, INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name)], changelogMode=[I]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, insert_only_source]], fields=[id, name], changelogMode=[I])

TestCase.name: testRetractSource
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(op=[$0], id=[$1], name=[$2]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) op, INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, retract_source]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[null], select=[op,id,name], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) op, INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name)], changelogMode=[I]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, retract_source]], fields=[id, name], changelogMode=[I,UB,UA,D])

TestCase.name: testUpsertSource
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(op=[$0], id=[$1], name=[$2]) +- LogicalTableFunctionScan(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) op, INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name)]) +- LogicalProject(id=[$0], name=[$1]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, upsert_source]])

ProcessTableFunction(invocation=[TO_CHANGELOG(TABLE(#0), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT(), DEFAULT())], uid=[null], select=[op,id,name], rowType=[RecordType(VARCHAR(2147483647) op, INTEGER id, VARCHAR(2147483647) name)], changelogMode=[I]) +- ChangelogNormalize(key=[id], changelogMode=[I,UB,UA,D]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[id]], changelogMode=[I,UA,D]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, upsert_source]], fields=[id, name], changelogMode=[I,UA,D])
